---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

A board-certified preventive medicine physician interested in workplace mental health, community health, and health policy.

## Areas of Interest

- Social Determinants of Health
- Workplace Mental Health
- Community Medicine
- Health Policy and Management

## Education

- **PhD**, Public Health, Korea University Graduate School, Korea
- **MPP**, Public Policy, KDI School of Public Policy and Management, Korea
- **MD**, Medicine, Korea University, Korea
- **BA**, Sociology, Korea University, Korea
- **BA**, Economics (Minor), Korea University, Korea

## Work Experience

### Mar 2024–Apr 2027

- Epidemiologist & Officer (Health Policy and Management), Armed Forces Medical Command, MND
- Epidemiologist & Officer (Preventive Medicine), Armed Forces Medical Research Institute, MND

<details>
<summary>Research & management duties</summary>

**Research in Public Health Medicine**

- Member, Institutional Review Board (IRB), Armed Forces Medical Command, MND (2026–2027)
- Research on Determinants of Mental Health among Military Personnel, Armed Forces Medical Command, MND (2026–2027)
- Research on Healthcare Utilization Patterns of Military Personnel at Military and Civilian Hospitals, Armed Forces Medical Command, MND (2025–2026)

**Healthcare Management Officer**

- Publication of the Military Health Statistics Annual Report, Armed Forces Medical Command, MND
- Quarterly analysis of military hospital utilization and quality indicators, and development of policy proposals
- Infectious disease surveillance and biosafety inspection in military settings
- Publication of the Monthly Infectious Disease Report, Armed Forces Medical Research Institute, MND
- Member, Institutional Biosafety Committee and Biosafety Inspector, Armed Forces Medical Research Institute, MND
- Member, Biosafety Inspection Committee, Arms Control and Verification Team, MND

</details>

### Mar 2020–Feb 2024

- Medical Resident (Preventive Medicine), Korea University Medicine
- Medical Intern, Korea University Medicine

<details>
<summary>Clinical, research & teaching activities</summary>

**1. Public Health & Preventive Medicine Practice**

Contributed to national health promotion and disease prevention initiatives, focusing on workplace health programs and epidemiologic surveillance. Supported national livestock worker health checks (2022) and proposed reforms to the 36-hour consecutive duty system for medical residents (2023). Gained practical experience in national mental health policy and service programs through secondment to the National Center for Mental Health (2023); Secondment, Department of Mental Health Services, National Center for Mental Health Jan 2023 – Feb 2023.

**2. Research in Public Health Medicine**

Research social determinants of health, public mental health, and workplace well-being. Led or contributed to studies on medical residents' duty hours, COVID-19 and health equity, and spatiotemporal disease analyses. Presented work at conferences by the Korean Society for Preventive Medicine, KAHPM, and KAMS.

**3. General Clinical Practice**

Gained clinical experience across primary care, emergency medicine, and post-operative care. Served as a patient care physician at Seoul's Community Treatment Centre during the COVID-19 pandemic (2022); Physician, Seoul COVID-19 Community Treatment Center (part-time) Jan 2022 – Jun 2022.

**4. Education & Teaching**

As a teaching assistant at Korea University College of Medicine, support courses in Preventive Medicine, Medical Law, and community-based clinical electives. Organize Preventive Medicine Grand Rounds to foster interactive learning and strengthen graduate-level training.

</details>

## Licenses & Certifications

- Medical License, Korea Ministry of Health and Welfare
- Board Certification in Preventive Medicine, Korea Ministry of Health and Welfare
- Certified Specialist in Obesity Medicine, Korean Society for the Study of Obesity
- Certified General Health Screening Physician, The Korean Association of Health Screening
- Certified Specialist in Geriatrics, The Korea Geriatrics Society (planned)

## Professional Activities & Academic Service

- **Board Member**, Korean Society for Preventive Medicine & Chairperson of the Future Generations Committee (Jan 2026–Present)
- **Vice President and Founding Member**, Korean Association of Preventive Medicine Physicians (Mar 2025–Present)

### Korean Association of Preventive Medicine Physicians

**Vice President; Founding Member** Mar 2025–Present

- Oversees external relations, organizational management, and health policy affairs for the association.
- Presented "Preparatory Survey for the Korean Association of Preventive Medicine Physicians: Where Do Preventive Medicine Physicians Stand Today?" at the 77th Fall Academic Conference of the Korean Society for Preventive Medicine, Oct 2025.

### Korean Society for Preventive Medicine

- Board Member
- Chairperson, Future Generations Committee
- Member, Social Mental Health Committee
- Member, Clinical Preventive Medicine Committee
- Former Member, Policy Planning Taskforce
- Former Member, Residency Training Development Taskforce

### Korean Society of Occupational and Environmental Medicine

- Member, Corporate Occupational Physicians Council
- Research Member, Work, Sleep, Health Cohort Research Group

### Korean Society for Equity in Health

- Member, Labour and Mental Health Research Group
- Former Student Member, Academic Committee

### Korean Society of Epidemiology

- Member, Psychiatric Epidemiology Research Group

### Others

- Member, Korean Society of Health Administration
- Member, Korean Association of Health Economics and Policy
- Member; Certified Specialist in Obesity Medicine, Korean Society for the Study of Obesity
- Member; preparing for Geriatrics certification (expected 2026), Korean Geriatrics Society
- Former Member, American Public Health Association
- Former Associate Member, World Medical Association

## Research & Publications

- **Principal Investigator**, Determinants of Mental Health Among Military Personnel
- **Principal Investigator**, Study on Reforming the 36-hour Consecutive Duty System for Residents
- Peer reviewer for International Journal of Equity in Health and BMC Public Health
- Publications (Google Scholar)

### Peer Review Activities

- Reviewer, International Journal of Equity in Health
- Reviewer, BMC Public Health

## Conferences & Presentations

### (1) Academic Conferences and Seminars

- **Sep 2026**. Introduction to Research on Strengthening Military Infectious-Disease Response and Management Capacity; and Determinants of Mental Health among Military Personnel (planned). 57th Conference of Military Medicine & 2026 International Conference on Military Trauma Surgery
- **May 2026**, Association between Working Hours and Depression among Korean Military Personnel: A Repeated Cross-sectional Analysis of the Military Health Survey (2023–2025) (Poster). 2026 Spring Conference of the Korean Society for Health Equity.
- **Apr 2026**, Extreme Work, Depressive Symptoms, and Suicidal Ideation among Korean Residents: Focusing on Working Hours, Consecutive Shifts, and Sleep Deprivation during On-call Shifts (Oral). 2026 Spring Conference of the Association for Health Policy for Criticism and Alternatives.
- **Nov 2025**. After Residents' Return: Where Should Policies for Improving Resident Working Conditions Go? (Lecture). 42nd Online Comprehensive Academic Conference, Korean Medical Association
- **Oct 2025**. Preparatory Survey for the Founding of the Korean Association of Preventive Medicine Physicians: Where Do Preventive Medicine Specialists Stand Today? (Oral). 77th Fall Academic Conference, Korean Society for Preventive Medicine
- **Oct 2025**. Complex Associations between Alcohol Use and Suicidal Ideation in South Korea: Cross-sectional and Longitudinal Analyses of a National Panel, 2011–2022. (Oral). 77th Fall Academic Conference, Korean Society for Preventive Medicine
- **Nov 2023**. The Unequal Impact of the COVID-19 Pandemic: Case Fatality in Residents of Long-term Care Facilities and Community Dwellers, Korea. (Poster). 2023 APHA Annual Meeting
- **Oct 2023**. Gender Inequalities in Mental Health during the COVID-19 Pandemic: Differences between Urban and Non-urban Areas. (Oral presentation). 3rd Joint Academic Conference of Five Academic Societies on Identifying and Reducing Regional Health Inequalities
- **Jul 2023**. COVID-19 and Health Inequalities. (Oral). Preventive Medicine Grand Rounds, Department of Preventive Medicine, Korea University College of Medicine
- **Oct 2022**. Health Inequalities in Cardiovascular Diseases Morbidity and Mortality: 10-year National Representative Cohort Follow-up Study. (Poster). 73rd Fall Academic Conference, Korean Society for Preventive Medicine
- **Dec 2021**. Welfare State, Social Policy, and Health. (Oral). Preventive Medicine Grand Rounds, Department of Preventive Medicine, Korea University College of Medicine
- **Oct 2021**. COVID-19 and Mental Health: Inequalities by Age, Gender, and Region Using Nationwide Data from 2015–2020. (Oral). 71st Fall Academic Conference, Korean Society for Preventive Medicine

### (2) Presentations to Parliament, Government Committees, and NGOs

- **Nov 2023**. Directions for Reforming Resident Duty-hour Regulations. (Presentation). Subcommittee on Physician Workforce, Healthcare Policy Deliberation Committee, Ministry of Health and Welfare
- **Sep 2023**. Directions for Reforming the Residency Training System. (Presentation). Taskforce on Residency Training System Reform, Ministry of Health and Welfare
- **Jul 2023**. Key Policy Issues Related to the Physician Assistant System. (Presentation). Consultative Body for Improving the Physician Assistant System, Ministry of Health and Welfare
- **Apr 2023**. Reducing Resident Working Hours and Limiting Consecutive Duty to 24 Hours. (Presentation). Parliamentary Forum hosted by Rep. Shin Hyun-young
- **Jan 2023**. Integration of the Medical Profession. (Presentation). KMA Policy Workshop, Korean Medical Association
- **Oct 2022**. Reducing Resident Working Hours and Limiting Consecutive Duty to 24 Hours. (Presentation). World Medical Association – Junior Doctors Network (WMA-JDN)

### (3) Panel Discussions, Invited Discussions, and Chair Roles

- **Jun 2026**. Institutionalizing Dedicated Physician-Assistant Personnel and Restructuring the Healthcare System: Focusing on Improving the Resident Training Environment and Ensuring Patient Safety. (Discussant). Academic Conference, Korean Society for Quality in Health Care
- **Feb 2026**. Parliamentary Forum on Securing Residents' Health Rights and Improving the Training Environment. (Discussant). Parliamentary Forum hosted by Rep. Lee Soo-jin
- **Dec 2025**. Healthcare Workforce Shortage. (Discussant). ETHOS (Ethics in a World of Emerging Technologies) 7.0
- **Nov 2025**. Balancing Resident Training and Physician Assistant Nursing Practice from a Quality Improvement Perspective. (Discussant). Fall Academic Conference, Korean Society for Quality in Health Care
- **Dec 2023**. Continuous Forum on Medical School Quotas: Expansion of Medical School Enrollment, Accelerated Drain from STEM Fields, Imbalances in Talent Supply, and Alternatives for Training Physician-scientists. (Discussant). Parliamentary Forum hosted by Rep. Shin Hyun-young
- **Nov 2023**. Physician Assistant Session (Discussant) / Post-COVID-19 Session (Discussant). Fall Academic Conference, Korean Academy of Health Policy and Management
- **Aug 2023**. Forum on Appropriate Management of Bed Resources and Responses to the Establishment of Branch Campuses of Metropolitan Tertiary Hospitals. (Discussant). Parliamentary Forum hosted by Rep. Lee Jong-sung
- **Jul 2023**. Continuous Forum on Current Healthcare Issues: Toward Better Citizens' Health through Collaboration among Health Professionals. (Discussant). Parliamentary Forum hosted by Rep. Shin Hyun-young
- **Jul 2023**. Korean Healthcare Diagnosed by Young Doctors and Its Solutions. (Discussant). Young Doctors Roundtable Special
- **Jun 2023**. Continuous Forum on Current Healthcare Issues: Physician Supply in Medically Underserved Areas. (Discussant). Parliamentary Forum hosted by Rep. Shin Hyun-young
- **Jun 2023**. Problems with Essential Healthcare Support Policies and Exploration of Korean Alternatives. (Discussant) / The Present and Future of Residency Training: Focusing on 36-hour Consecutive Duty (Chair). Academic Conference, Korean Academy of Medical Sciences
- **May 2023**. Where Should Korea's Physician Workforce Policy Go? (Discussant). Spring Academic Conference, Korean Academy of Health Policy and Management
- **Mar 2023**. The Need to Strengthen the Pediatric Essential Healthcare System to Overcome Low Birth Rates. (Discussant). Parliamentary Forum hosted by Rep. Baek Jong-heon
- **Dec 2022**. Reforming Medical School Curricula to Foster Physician-scientists. (Discussant). Parliamentary Forum hosted by Rep. Shin Hyun-young and Rep. Cho Myung-hee
- **Dec 2022**. New Year Roundtable: Urgent Diagnosis of Essential Healthcare and Measures for Sound Health Insurance Financing. (Discussant). Medical Times
- **Sep 2022**. Where Should the Yoon Suk Yeol Government's Essential Healthcare Strengthening Policy Go? (Discussant). K-HOSPITAL FAIR
- **May 2015**. Forum on Improving Housing Problems among Young Adults in Their Twenties. (Discussant). Euljiro Committee, Democratic Party of Korea

### (4) Invited Lectures

- **Apr 2026**. Problems and Reform Directions of the Current Internship System. Korean Healthcare Policy School
- **Feb 2025**. Overview of Smallpox Vaccination. Armed Forces Nursing Academy
- **Oct 2024**. Overview of Smallpox Vaccination. Armed Forces Medical Research Institute
- **Feb 2023**. Career Choices for Early-career Physicians. Korean Medical Association

## Advisory and Policy Roles

**Ministry of Health and Welfare, Republic of Korea**

- Expert Member, Subcommittee on Physician Workforce, Healthcare Policy Deliberation Committee (Sep 2023–Feb 2024)
- Member, Taskforce for Improving the Physician Assistant System (Jun 2023–Feb 2024)
- Member, Medical Residency Training Environment Evaluation Committee (Sep 2022–Feb 2024)
- Member, Policy Committee (Mar 2023–Feb 2024)
- Member, Investigation Committee (Sep 2021–Aug 2022)
- Member, Taskforce for Residency Training System Reform (Jul 2023–Oct 2023)

## Panel and Focus-Group Contributions

- A Study on Legislation for the Healthcare Safety Net (Korea Legislation Research Institute, 2026)
- Basic Research for Introducing Green Prescriptions: Overseas Case Analysis and Development of Park and Green Service Items (Keimyung University Master's Thesis, 2024)
- Policy Study on Strengthening Publicness in Residency Training (Korea Hospital Association, 2023)
- National Survey on Resident Working Conditions (Ministry of Health and Welfare / Health Insurance Review & Assessment Service, 2023)

## Leadership

- **President** (Sep 2022–Aug 2023), Vice President and Policy Advisor, Korean Intern Resident Association
- **Director of Policy**, Korean Medical Association (Sep 2022–Aug 2023)
- **Vice President**, Korea University Undergraduate Student Union (Dec 2014–Nov 2015)

### Korean Intern Resident Association

- President (Sep 2022–Aug 2023)
- Principal Investigator, Study on Reforming the 36-hour Consecutive Duty System for Residents
- Principal Investigator, 2022 National Resident Survey
- Policy Advisor (Sep 2023–Feb 2024)
- Vice President (Sep 2021–Aug 2022)
- Lead coordinator for the KIRA policy proposal booklet for the 20th presidential election

### Korean Medical Association

- Director of Policy (Sep 2021–Aug 2023)
- Delegate, KMA National Assembly (Sep 2021–Aug 2022)
- Delegate, Seoul Medical Association (Nov 2022–Oct 2023)

## Committee Appointments

- Member, Community Care Special Committee (Sep 2023–Feb 2024)
- Member, Operations Committee, KMA Institute for Healthcare Policy (Sep 2021–Aug 2023)
- Vice Chair, Special Committee on Eradicating Unlicensed Medical Practice (Sep 2022–Aug 2023)
- Member, Member Rights Committee (Sep 2022–Aug 2023)
- Member, KMA Policy "Medical and Health Policy" Division (Sep 2021–Aug 2023)

## Education and Training

- Completion of Advanced Course on Health Policy, Korean Medical Association (May 2023–Oct 2023)
- Completion of Health Policy Academy for Junior Doctors (Jan 2024–Feb 2024)
- **Founder and Director**, Woosadan Studio Feb 2018–Feb 2020
  - Organized alley concerts in Usadan Village, Itaewon
  - Operated cultural space rental and community-based cultural programs
- **Vice President**, Korea University Undergraduate Student Union (Dec 2014–Nov 2015)
- Member, Youth Policy Council, Seongbuk-gu, Seoul (Oct 2015–Apr 2016)
- Member, Tuition Review Committee, Korea University (Jan 2013–Feb 2013)
- President, Pre-med Student Union, Korea University College of Medicine (Dec 2012–Nov 2013)

## Other Engagements

- Policy Committee Member, Korea Family Association for the Mentally Disabled (2022–2023)
- Volunteer / participant, Mad Pride Seoul mental health rights event (2019)
- Operating Member, Amnesty International Korea (Oct 2012–Present)

## Volunteers

- Medical volunteer support at civic rallies around the National Assembly and Yeouido (2024)
- Support and participation at the memorial altar for victims of the 29 October Itaewon crowd crush (2022)
- Physician Assistant, Seoul Foreign Resident Center (2019)

## Honours and Awards

- Honoured by the Minister of Health and Welfare, Republic of Korea (Apr 2023)
- Kang Sang-ho Award, Korean Society for Health Equity (May 2026)
- Excellent Oral Presentation Award, Korean Society for Preventive Medicine (Oct 2025)
- Kim Il-ho Award, Korean Intern Resident Association (Dec 2023)
- Outstanding Paper Award, COVID-19 Student Paper Contest, SNU Institute of Health and Environment (Dec 2022)

## Global Activities

### World Medical Association – Junior Doctors Network (WMA-JDN)

**Korean Delegation Member** Apr 2022–Feb 2024

- Paris, France / Berlin, Germany 2022
- Nairobi, Kenya / Kigali, Rwanda 2023
- Seoul, Korea (host country; personal participation) 2024
- Porto, Portugal (personal participation) 2025

### IFMSA (KMSA) Korean Delegation Member

- Dhaka, Bangladesh (Sep 2014)

### Korean Medical Students' Association (KMSA)

- Member (Mar 2012–Feb 2013)

## Scholarships and Fellowships

- National Service Fellowship, KDI School (2024–2026)
- Travel Grant for International Conference Participation, Korean Academy of Medical Sciences (Oct 2023)
- Short-term Training Grant for Fostered Specialties, Ministry of Health and Welfare (Oct 2023)
- Physician-Scientist Scholarship, Korea University College of Medicine (2021–2023)
- Public Health Scholarship, Korea University College of Medicine (2021–2023)
- Graduate Mentor Scholarship for International Students, Korea University (2022)
- University Service Scholarship, Korea University (2012–2015)
- Merit Scholarship, Korea University (2012–2013)
- Samsung Junior Frontier Leader (JFL) Scholarship (2009)
